mapper.select: SELECT /* /storeUsim/joinUsimPriceNew : McpStoreUsimMapper.selectJoinUsimPriceNew */ DECODE(ETC3,'Y',ETC4,ETC1) AS JOIN_PRICE , DECODE(ETC3,'Y',ETC5,ETC2) AS USIM_PRICE from CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP0053' AND CD_VAL = #{gubun} AND ROWNUM =1
SELECT /* /storeUsim/failUsim : McpStoreUsimMapper.selectFailUsims */ COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_FAIL_USIM@DL_MCP WHERE 1=1 AND USIM_NO = #{iccId}
SELECT /* /storeUsim/usimDcamt : McpStoreUsimMapper.selectUsimDcamt */ DC_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_SPEC F WHERE RATE_CD =#{rateCd} AND AGRM_TRM ='0' AND ROWNUM =1 ORDER BY APPL_STRT_DTTM DESC
